ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A short bio or description of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user's email is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the note */,
  "content" TEXT /* Main content of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (text, image, video) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was last updated */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the note is private */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the note has been viewed */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the note has been shared */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the note */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "note_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note share */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the note */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the note is shared with (if private sharing) */,
  "shared_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was shared */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the share is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_note_shares_note_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_id") REFERENCES notes ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_note_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_note_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "commented_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_note_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_id") REFERENCES notes ("note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the note */,
  "liked_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_note_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_id") REFERENCES notes ("note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., share, comment, like) */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_note_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_id") REFERENCES notes ("note_id")
)
